description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow surrounded by a low boundary wall and landscaped gardens. The structure features a combination of white exterior walls and dark gray gabled roofs, with multiple rooflines creating visual interest. The front facade includes a double garage, a paved driveway, and a main entrance flanked by large windows and decorative shrubs. The backyard is spacious, featuring a wooden deck, a hot tub, outdoor seating, and a hammock, with additional green space and flowering trees. The windows are large and mostly rectangular, providing ample natural light to the interior. The property is well-maintained, with a mix of hardscaping and soft landscaping elements throughout.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with white walls, dark gabled roofs, large windows, and landscaped gardens, featuring a garage, deck, and outdoor amenities.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, double garage, paved driveway, and symmetrical landscaping with shrubs and flowering trees.
description_view_1: Side-rear view highlighting the garage doors, expansive backyard lawn, wooden deck, and hot tub area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wooden deck, hot tub, outdoor seating, hammock, and large glass doors opening to the backyard.
description_view_3: Side view with a focus on the green roof sections, boundary wall, and a flowering tree in the corner.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on multiple facades
